about.title: About
about.subtitle: Passionate about development and new technologies since childhood.
about.description: Since my childhood, I have been passionate about computing and all new technologies. I have successfully carried out several projects over the years, such as creating servers, 3D models, content for Garry's Mod, as well as designing websites and applications. All these experiences have allowed me to acquire skills in different languages and master many topics related to computer science. Currently pursuing a degree in Computer Engineering at EPITA and graduate of a BTS SIO SLAM.
about.diploma: BTS SIO SLAM diploma validated, currently in EPITA engineering program

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: My professional journey through internships and roles at AXA, City of Paris, and MyLuxuryCar.

exp_axa.description: Development with modern stacks, integration in an enterprise environment with agile methodologies.

exp_paris.description: Design and implementation of innovative features by leveraging Google App Script to improve existing tools. Led the creation of a dynamic web interface connected to Google Sheets for room and event management. Creation and sending of targeted newsletters. Website administration and maintenance.

exp_luxurycar.description: Complete website creation from A to Z design, development, deployment. Complete admin interface for vehicle management, content and statistics. Integration of external API to synchronize vehicles. SEO optimization, infrastructure management and social media communication.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Personal and professional projects that showcase my skills.

workshop.title: WorkshopRessources
workshop.description: Platform dedicated to content creators for Garry's Mod featuring resources, images and tutorials. Exclusive 100% Open-Source tools to optimize modders' projects. Initially built with native PHP, now converted to React for better user experience and easier maintenance.

epitime.title: EpiTime
epitime.description: Website created to replace EPITA's scheduling system, Zeus, which I found impractical. It is developed in React and uses an external API to fetch schedule data.

reflect.title: ReFlect
reflect.description: A project aimed at the FiveM video game, the website is a license management platform for servers developed by the ReFlect Team.

myluxury.title: MyLuxuryCar Paris
myluxury.description: Website created during my internship at MyLuxuryCar Paris. I built the entire site from scratch using PHP for the backend and JavaScript for the frontend. I also integrated an external API to synchronize vehicles and optimized the site's SEO.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: An opportunity, a question, or just want to chat? Feel free to reach out.
contact.heading: Let's stay in touch
contact.description: Currently interning at AXA and pursuing an engineering degree at EPITA. Don't hesitate to contact me for any opportunity, question, or simply to exchange ideas!
